all_news.title: Apple says former employee exploited ‘rare’ bug to download confidential files after leaving for OpenAI
all_news.snippet: Apple would not comment on the "security breach," which allegedly allowed a former employee to download sensitive files from Apple's network long after he departed the company for rival OpenAI.
